HGSS.675.0001:
You’re awesome! I like you!
I look for Pokémon here every day.\f
When I’m in the tall grass, I find all
kinds of Berries.\f
If you’d like, I’ll share some.
Could I get your phone number? [0200,0000]
HGSS.675.0002:
You’ll hear from me as soon as I
find anything that you might like.
HGSS.675.0003:
Oh well.\f
Don’t be shy if you want to get my
number.
HGSS.675.0004:
When I’m in the tall grass, I find all
kinds of Berries.\f
If you’d like, I’ll share some.
Could I get your phone number? [0200,0000]
HGSS.675.0005:
Good to see you!
See? This is what I found.\r
It’s for you!\f
HGSS.675.0006:
You’re nearby aren’t you? Well, then
just come talk in person!
HGSS.675.0007:
Are your Pokémon growing?\f
My Pokémon are growing a bit too
quickly for me. It’s overwhelming!\f
[0100,000A,0000]’s growing especially
quickly. I think it’ll get tough.\f
See you later!
HGSS.675.0008:
Oh yeah, we knocked out a wild
[0100,000B,0000] with one hit a while back.\f
It went down so easily, I felt a
little sorry for the poor thing.\f
See you later!
HGSS.675.0009:
Oh yeah, a wild [0100,000B,0000] got
away from me at the last second.\f
I know it’s a common Pokémon...\f
But it does annoy me that it got
away when I almost had it.\f
See you later!
HGSS.675.0010:
Do you feel like a Pokémon battle?
It won’t be like last time!\f
[0104,0003,0000]’s where I’ll be.
Let me know when you get there.
HGSS.675.0011:
Let’s battle already!\f
[0104,0003,0000] is where I am.
Please get here as soon as you can!
HGSS.675.0012:
Huh? Berries?\f
Sorry, I haven’t found any yet.
I’ll call you if I find any.\r
Will you please wait?
HGSS.675.0013:
I found all kinds of Berries. If you
want, I’ll share some with you.\f
I’ll be waiting on [0104,0003,0000].
HGSS.675.0014:
How come you’re not here yet?\f
[0104,0003,0000] is where I am.
Please get here as soon as you can!
HGSS.675.0015:
The Bug-Catching Contest is at the
National Park today.\r
Are you going, [0103,0000,0000]?\f
I’m trying to make up my mind.
HGSS.675.0016:
The Bug-Catching Contest is at the
National Park today.\r
Are you going, [0103,0000,0000]?\f
I’m trying to make up my mind.
